TestCase z19Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        // No elements to process, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    int min_val = follow_case.a[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        if (follow_case.a[i] < min_val) {
            min_val = follow_case.a[i];
        }
    }
    // Replace a random element if it is greater than min_val
    int idx = 0; // for determinism, choose first element
    if (follow_case.a[idx] > min_val) {
        follow_case.a[idx] = min_val;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
